title: GrowForce Biofertilizer — 12-Strain Professional Microbial Liquid
short_description: High-potency liquid microbial fertilizer with a 12-strain live consortia. Boosts nutrient uptake and root resilience in all growing systems. Ships live worldwide.

title: GrowForce Bentonite Clay — Mineral-Rich Soil Amendment
short_description: Premium pharmaceutical-grade bentonite clay for enhanced water retention and cation exchange capacity (CEC). Ideal for sandy soils and regenerative plots.

title: Biochar + Live Microbes — Activated Carbon for Soil Biology
short_description: Activated biochar pre-colonized with 12 live strains. Rebuilds soil biology and provides permanent microbial habitat. +57% water retention.

title: Manual Module — Bioreactor
short_description: Ruggedized manual control interface for Algaeo bioreactor systems. Professional analog overrides for critical environmental management.

title: AutoModule — AI-Driven Bioreactor Control System
short_description: AI-driven automated control module for precision bioreactor management. Real-time sensor integration and global cloud monitoring.

title: AgTurbo Nutrient Refill — Professional Growth Formula
short_description: Concentrated AgTurbo nutrient refill for continuous bioreactor operation. Professional-grade salts and trace minerals for maximum biomass production.

title: Live Nannochloropsis — Premium Reef Phytoplankton Culture
short_description: Pure live Nannochloropsis phytoplankton. High-density marine culture for reef tanks, copepods, and professional aquaculture. Ships live worldwide.

title: Live Chlorella — Freshwater Microalgae Culture
short_description: Pure live Chlorella culture for freshwater ecosystems, research, and bioreactor inoculation. High-protein and rapid growth properties.

title: Live Scenedesmus — High-Density Freshwater Culture
short_description: Pure live Scenedesmus culture. Rapidly growing freshwater microalgae ideal for bio-remediation, research, and carbon capture studies.
